zh.lifeSummary: 當John Kirby of Horton Kirby於1370年出生在英國肯特霍頓 科比時，他的父親Richard Kirkby48歲，母親Lady Isabella Bardsey23歲。他和Lora de Ros至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1423年在英國肯特享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Kirby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern and eastern England called Kirby or Kirkby, from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Irish: adopted for Ó Garmhaic ‘descendant of Cíarmhac’, a personal name meaning ‘dark son’. Compare Kerwick .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Geirble ‘son of Geirble’, a personal name of uncertain origin. The name is preserved in the townland name of Carrowkeribly in County Mayo.

variants.name: Kerwick
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Garmhaic, more commonly Anglicized as Kirby .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Kirby of Horton Kirby was born in 1370, in Horton Kirby, Kent, England, his father, Richard Kirkby, was 48 and his mother, Lady Isabella Bardsey, was 23. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Lora de Ros. He died in 1423, in Kent, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Kirby of Horton Kirby est né en 1370, à Horton Kirby, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Richard Kirkby, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabella Bardsey, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Lora de Ros. Il est décédé en 1423, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Kirby of Horton Kirby 1370 in Horton Kirby, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Kirkby 48 und seine Mutter Lady Isabella Bardsey 23. Er hatte mit Lora de Ros mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1423 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Kirby of Horton Kirby è nato il nel 1370 nel Horton Kirby, Kent, England, il suo padre, Richard Kirkby, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabella Bardsey, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Lora de Ros. Morì nel 1423, nel Kent, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Kirby of Horton Kirbyが1370年にイギリスケントホールトン キルビーで生まれた時，父Richard Kirkbyは48歳，母Lady Isabella Bardseyは23歳であった。彼はLora de Rosとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1423年にイギリスケントで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Kirby of Horton Kirby(이)가 1370년 영국 켄트 호르턴 커비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Kirkby(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabella Bardsey(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Lora de Ros(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1423년 영국 켄트에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Kirby of Horton Kirby родился в 1370 г. в местности хауртон кирби, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Kirkby было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabella Bardsey, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Lora de Ros. Он умер в 1423 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.
